title: Nirvana Baseline Snapshot
description: Snapshot of system KPIs over a defined window, used as reference point for measuring evolution. Produced by skills/harness/scripts/baseline.ts.

git_sha.description: HEAD of nirvana-os at compute time, when available

kpis.description: Each KPI follows the same shape. Values that cannot be measured in this window (insufficient signal) are marked unmeasurable=true.

value.description: Computed metric value. null when unmeasurable.

sample_size.description: How many records contributed to value.

confidence.description: high: sample_size>=30 and signal coverage>=80%. medium: 10-29. low: <10. unmeasurable: no signal in this window.

raw.description: Underlying counters or distribution. Shape depends on the KPI.

unmeasurable_reason.description: Set when confidence=unmeasurable, e.g. 'event invocation_start emitted only 3 times' or 'phase X not yet implemented'.

event_counts.description: Total count of each audit event type seen in window. Useful for sanity-checking signal availability.

dispatched_with_cost.description: Traces with dispatch event AND non-zero cost_emission in same trace_id.

dispatched_without_cost.description: Traces with dispatch event but no cost_emission. High values indicate trace_id fragmentation.
